issue.body:
# Sorry. The website is infected by AdShield, Inc.

Unfortunately, It is complicated to resolve with a regular adblock rule because the website is being protected by service of Ad-Shield that is an anti-adblock company.

## Userscript Installation
Please block Ad-Shield advertisement by installing [tinyShield userscript](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield).
Please check its installation guideline written in English by visiting [this URL](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.md).

If you can understand Korean language, please refer https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/blob/main/README.ko.md.

<details>
<summary>Detailed description for iOS users</summary>

1. Install [**Usercripts**](https://apps.apple.com/us/app/userscripts/id1463298887) app
2. Enable **Usercripts** extension in Safari settings
	* iOS 18+: `System settings` => `Apps` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	* iOS 17 and older: `System settings` => `Safari` => `Extensions`
	Find **Usercripts**, enable it and allow `On other sites` permission
3. Open the [tinyShield ](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@filteringdev/tinyshield@latest/dist/tinyShield.user.js) userscript URL in browser
4. Press the extensions icon in the address bar of Safari and select Userscripts 
5. Tap to install
6. In opened popup, scroll down and press Install button
7. Done.

</details>

## Still Have a Problem?
An issue is occurred when the userscript is applied, please report to [this issue tracker](https://github.com/FilteringDev/tinyShield/issues).

AdGuard Base filter

AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,

AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter

Online Malicious URL Blocklist,

comment.body:
Investigated using Chrome DevTools and [a Safari HAR log](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26666172/listenbrainz.org.user.MacStainless.zip) (captured in Safari with AdGuard Mini active, in a non-reproducing session).

- No blocked or failed requests; all network traffic returns 200.
- Socket.io establishes via long-polling and then upgrades to WebSocket. No issues observed.
- The error is intermittent and not reproducible on demand.
One anomaly worth noting: the HAR reports onLoad firing ~325 seconds after navigation.

The bug lies either in the AdGuard product (Safari's WebKit) or on the website. I need to check if filters can be used to temporarily fix a problem (usually when the site is broken).

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://backup.c-o-d.net](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fbackup.c-o-d.net) ### Comment > Здравствуйте! Я столкнулся с проблемой, что на Android не удается установить соединение с сервером FTP. На этапе получения списка файлов происходит ошибка. Есть предположение, что проблема с подменой IP-адресов, которую выполняет AdGuard. Что я делаю: > 1. В AdGuard я настроил использование прокси-сервера (дополнительно для FTP-клиента я отключал использование прокси, но это не помогло) > 2. В FTP-клиенте FX Explorer (дополнительно пробовал AirExplorer) пытаюсь подключиться к серверу FTP в Интернете > 3. Получаю ошибку, что не удается установить соединение с сервером. > Насколько я знаю принципы работы протокола FTP и судя по логам AdGuard, можно сделать вывод, что не удается клиенту установить транспортное соединение, через которое клиент пытается получить список файлов/скачать файл/загрузить файл. Основное соединение работает, а вспомогательное - нет ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3j1mbpzuk604c0ocockw04skw4wgswsiygzkri94c8.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 2 ![Screenshot 2](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3epyo9td40w0sgo48c8ks08k0w0oo4w4t0rbfr0k0s.jpg?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/7dtgbp8c8qcc8kwog8wck4404kk4gc435cg7793188.jpg?nc=1)

AdGuard Base filter,
AdGuard Mobile Ads filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter,
AdGuard URL Tracking filter,
EasyPrivacy

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter AdGuard mode: | VPN HTTPS filtering: | enabled Android system root: | no Tracking protection: | **General**:
Block trackers,
Strip URLs from tracking parameters,
Send Do-Not-Track header DNS filtering: | disabled Browsing Security: | enabled Browsing Security statistics: | disabled Userscripts: | disabled Userstyles: | disabled Other extensions used: | `Trend Micro, Happ` ### Issue configuration [Import](https://reports.adguard.com/settings/import.html?product_type=and&product_version=4.12.3&system_version=Android+14&browser=other&browser_detail=nextapp.fx+%28FX+Explorer%29&filters=2.11.3.17.118.4&android.mode=VPN&android.system_root=false&dns.enabled=false&https.filtering=true&browsing_security.enabled=true&browsing_security.statistics_enabled=false&stealth.enabled=true&stealth.strip_url=true&stealth.DNT=true&stealth.block_trackers=true&license_type=paid)

issue.body:
This issue is known to be solved with [AdGuard Extra](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdGuardExtra) userscript.

If you’re using AdGuard for Windows, Mac or Android, please make sure that AdGuard Extra is enabled in the application settings.

If you’re using AdGuard Browser Extension, we suggest installing AdGuard Extra in addition to it.

* [Install for Chrome, Edge or other Chromium-based browsers](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_chrome_release)
* [Install for Firefox](https://agrd.io/adguard_extra_firefox_release)

comment.body:
Cannot be fixed - doubleclick.net is required to be unblocked.

Please try AdGuard Private DNS and add `@@||pubads.g.doubleclick.net^` to user rules.
But keep in mind - this may cause Google ads to be displayed.

I have a paid subscription for you getting rid of adverts full stop on both my iPad and iPhone. comment.body:
Oh, you meant all of them. I thought you were just talking about these two. as you said `and this will make the rules with $$ / scriptlet one easier to read.`
```
txxxporn.tube,txxx.*$$script:contains(AdManager)
txxxporn.tube,txxx.*#%#//scriptlet('remove-node-text', 'script', 'AdManager')
In case some of the rules are needed for other domains, you can divided it.

I meant like this.
```adblock
! txxxporn.tube, txxx.com
txxxporn.tube,txxx.*$$script:contains(AdManager)
txxxporn.tube,txxx.*#%#//scriptlet('remove-node-text', 'script', 'AdManager')
txxxporn.tube,txxx.*##.video-conten div[class]:has(> div[class] > div[class] > div.direct-abnner)
